description_long: This object consists of two adjacent modern houses, each set on a landscaped plot with lawns, trees, and shrubbery. The house on the left is a single-story structure with a flat roof, large garage doors, and a minimalist design, surrounded by a border of flowering bushes and trees. The house on the right is a two-story residence with a complex, multi-gabled roof, prominent entryway, and a driveway leading to a garage. Both properties are enclosed by low fences and feature paved walkways, with the right house having a backyard pool and patio area. The landscaping includes a mix of deciduous and flowering trees, providing privacy and aesthetic appeal. The overall setting suggests a suburban neighborhood with ample green space and modern amenities.
description: Two modern suburban houses with landscaped yards, one single-story with a flat roof and one two-story with a gabled roof, surrounded by trees and fences.
description_view_0: Front view showing both houses side by side, highlighting the flat-roofed single-story house on the left and the multi-gabled two-story house on the right, with visible driveways and landscaping.
description_view_1: Rear view emphasizing the backyard of the right house with a pool and patio, and the back of the left house with its flat roof and surrounding trees.
description_view_2: Opposite front view, showing the main facades of both houses, with the right house's entryway and the left house's garage doors clearly visible.
description_view_3: View from behind the left house, focusing on its flat roof and the rear landscaping, while the right house's backyard and pool area are partially visible.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large windows and some vertical strips
attribute_entryway_design: Prominent entryway with steps, overhang, and wide doors; right house features a covered porch and decorative landscaping.
